name: IFB Agro Industries Limited
summary: IFB Agro Industries Limited manufactures and distributes alcoholic beverages, and processed marine foods in India and internationally. It operates in two segments, Spirit, Liquor and Spirituous Beverages; and Marine Products. The company offers extra neutral alcohol and Indian made Indian liquor products; value-added ingredients for poultry, aqua, cattle, and swine feed; food grade carbon dioxide; dry ice; and feed nutrition boosters. It also operates aqua shops; processes and exports marine products to Belgium, France, Germany, Myanmar, Russia, Italy, Thailand, Japan, Vietnam, the United States, Canada, and the Middle East, as well as offers ready to cook and ready to fry sea food products to restaurants, hotels, and caterers. The company was incorporated in 1982 and is based in Kolkata, India.
